retired.note: Old pricing that must never appear anywhere: Starter £149, Advanced £299, Hosting add-on £29, bundle £871, package value 'advanced'.
retired.banned_figures_exceptions: 149 is also the current gbp_setup and google_ads_two_weeks add-on price; only the phrases 'Starter — £149' and '£149 one-time' are banned.

delivery.truth: PREVIEW within 24 hours. Site live within 14 days. Never claim the finished site is delivered in 24 hours.

guarantee.terms: full refund, client keeps the site

contact.reply_promise: WhatsApp within 1 hour, UK working hours

positioning.model: £499 one-time build, optional £49/mo managed plan. The £49/mo is OPTIONAL; never claim 'no monthly fees' and never imply the monthly fee is required.
